name: Gopher
license: Proprietary (Google DeepMind; research model, weights never released)
note: 280B dense decoder-only Transformer; DeepMind's key data point in scaling research ahead of Chinchilla.

results.notes: 5-shot average accuracy, reported in the Chinchilla paper's comparison table
Average accuracy across 62 BIG-bench tasks, reported in Chinchilla paper
RACE-h few-shot reading comprehension score (corrected slug from 'arc-challenge', which was a mislabel in the source record -- this is RACE-h, not ARC-Challenge)

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via arxiv.org/abs/2112.11446 (submitted 2021-12-08, matches releaseDate) and press coverage (InfoQ) -- 280B dense decoder-only Transformer trained on MassiveText, matches paramsB/archDisplay. Confirmed 2048-token context window via independent summaries of the Gopher paper (matches ctxK=2). Fetched full text of the Chinchilla paper (arxiv 2203.15556, ar5iv rendering) and confirmed its comparison table literally shows Gopher: MMLU 60.0, BIG-bench 54.4, TriviaQA 63.6, LAMBADA 74.5, and RACE-h 71.6 -- all four numeric rows matched. Corrected one row: the source record labeled the 71.6 score 'arc-challenge' while its own notes admitted it was actually RACE-h; renamed the benchmarkSlug to 'race-h' to remove the mislabel rather than keep an inaccurate slug. Closed/proprietary status confirmed (DeepMind research model, no weight release).
